message:
feat(fp-frame): str.extract named-group series name parity (frankenpandas-1r4h)

When Series.str.extract(pat) is called with a single named capture
group like (?P<number>\d+), pandas names the resulting Series after
the group rather than keeping the original series name. The previous
extract() always kept self.series.name(); it now consults
Regex::capture_names when captures_len == 2 (single group) and adopts
the group name if present. Multi-group patterns and unnamed groups
preserve the original series name unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
